titleStmt.title: SII 25.126: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 126. (A.R. No. 126 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The inscription is dated the Śaka 1309, Prabhava, Mēsha 2 śu 9, Thursday, Pūsam (Pushya) corresponding to 1387 A.D., March 28.

It refers to the sale of the kāṇiyāṭchi of the office of the accountant of the temple by the Śrī-rudra-śrī-māhēśvaras, Śrī Kāriyañ-cheyvārgaḷ, māḍāpattiyam-śeyvāṉ, the śivabrāhmaṇas of thirty vaṭṭam and the tāṉattār of the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyiṉār at Tiruppattūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu to the three persons viz., the temple accountant Brahmapriyaṉ, Chokkanārāyaṇaṉ Kariyamāṇikkāḻvāṉ of Maṭṭiyūr alias Nṛipaśēkhara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of the above nāḍu and Vēṇḍavaḷandāṉ Āyappiḷḷai of Śiṟuvayal in Tēnāṟṟuppōkku in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu. It states that a certain Ambalatāḍuvāṉ alias Āyiratteḻunūṟṟu-mūvēndavēḷāṉ committed a śivadrōha by managing to engage a smith named Āyiratteḻunūṟṟutaṭṭāṉ and a stone worker (kaṟtachchṉ) named Alaivāy-ugandāṉ to forge the stone records that would bestow upon him a house-site (maṉai) and certain other privileges that were not there for him in the village. After committing this crime he is mentioned to have ran away. The moment that the śivadrōha committed by him was detected, both the smith and the stonemason were taken to custody before the kaṇmāḷar, who punished them suitably and accordingly the prāyaśchitta was done to the temple.

It is further recorded that out of kāṇiyāṭchi right of the office of the accountant, exempting half of the share of the right of Brahmapriyaṉ, for the other half share, the price value was fixed for 300 Āḍūr-paṇam. The above right and all other privileges were sold by the sabhai after receiving the value of 300 Āḍūr-paṇam. This includes the 200 Āḍūr-paṇam given to a certain Viśaiyālayadēvar as kaṟpūra-mudal and 100 Āḍūr-paṇam given to the śrībhaṇḍāra of the temple.
It may be stated that the Viśaiyālayadēvar of the present record is different from his namesake who figures in a record of 1342 A.D. from the same temple. (See No. 120 of 1908).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrī śakābdam 1000 3 100 9ṉ melcellāniṉṟa prabhava varuṣattu meṣanāyaṟṟu Iraṇṭāntiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu navamiyum brahaspativaāramum pe
ṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeya ntiruppattūr Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyiṉār koyilil śrī rudra śrīmāheśvara śrī kāriyañ
ceyvārkaḷum māṭāpattiyañ ceyvāṉum muppatu vaṭṭattu śivabrāhmaṇarum tāḷattuk kamainta tāṉattārum Āka Ivvaṉaivomum Ikkoyiṟ
kaṇakku brahmapriyaṉukkum Iṉṉāṭṭu maṭṭiyūrāṉa nirvva^1^ cekaraccaturvveti maṅkalattu cokkanārāyaṇaṉ kariya māṇikkāḻvāṉukkum Ataḷaiyūr
nāṭṭu teṉāṟṟuppokku ciṟuvayaluṭaiyāṉ veṇṭavaḷantāṉ Āyappapiḷḷaikkum Āka Immuvaṟkum kaṇakkeḻuttukkāṇiyāṭci vilaipramāṇam paṇṇi
kkuṭutta paricāvatu kaṇakkaṉ kulālaṉ Ampalattāṭuvāṉāṉa Āyiratteḻunūṟṟu muventar veḷāṉ taṉakku grāmattil maṉaiyum mutaleḻuttum mutal va
ḻakkamum Illaiyāyirukkaccite tāṉaṟintatāka śivadroka māka kāṇāmal kaḷavile Āyirtteḻunūṟṟuttaṭṭāṉai Āṭpiṭittu kaṟtaccaṉ Alaivāyukan
tāṉaik koṇṭu taṉṉu teṉṟu kalveṭṭuvikkaiyil Ippaṭi ceyta Inta veḷippaṭṭu śivadrokam veḷippaṭṭu Ampalattāṭuvoṉ Ōṭippokaiyil taṭṭāṉai
yuṅkaṟtaccaṉaiyuṅ kaikkoṇṭu kaṇmāḷar kaiyyile kāṭṭikkuṭuttu kaṇmāḷarum Ivarkaḷai Aḻiyac ceytu tāṉattukku porunta prā
ccittam paṇṇiviṭukaiyālum Inta śivadrokiyāṉa Ampalattāṭuvāṉ muṉṉillāmal Oṭippokaiyālum koyiṟ kaṇakkeḻuttukkāṇiyā
ṭciyil brahmapriyaṉ kāṇiyāṭci Oṉṟu pāti nikki Ivaṉo pāti Oṉṟu pātikkum vilai niccayitta Āṭur ø3 100 Itil tevar vicaiyālaya tevaṟku kaṟ
pūramutalāka kuṭutta Āṭur ø2 100 śrī paṇṭārattukku mutalāka paṟṟiṉa Āṭur ø100 Āka Āṭur ø3 100 Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟṟukkum kaṇakeḻuttuk kāṇi
yāṭciyum sutantraṅkaḷ Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum cantrādityavat cellaviṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyiṉār
koyilil śrīrudra śrīmāheśvara śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum māṭāpattiyañ ceyvāṉum muppatu vaṭṭattu śivabrāhmaṇarum tānattuk kamainta
tānattārum Āka Ivvomum brahmapriyarukkum kariya māṇikkāḻvānukkum Āyappiḷḷaikkum Āka Im muvaṟkum
Digital edition of SII 25.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
